#pragma once
#include <Arduino.h>
#include <avr/pgmspace.h>

const int AI_INPUT_SIZE = 11;
const int AI_HIDDEN_SIZE = 8;
const int AI_ACTION_SIZE = 3;

// Input order:
// 0  = front
// 1  = front_delta
// 2  = front_right
// 3  = front_right_delta
// 4  = rear_right
// 5  = rear_right_delta
// 6  = right_angle = front_right - rear_right
// 7  = right_angle_delta = front_right_delta - rear_right_delta
// 8  = prev_wa
// 9  = prev_w
// 10 = prev_wd

// Output order:
// 0 = wa
// 1 = w
// 2 = wd

// PyTorch GRU gate order: reset, update, new
// rows 0..7   = reset gate r
// rows 8..15  = update gate z
// rows 16..23 = new gate n

const float GRU_WEIGHT_IH[24][11] PROGMEM = {
